report_name: Siemens Patches Critical Flaws in SIMATIC S7 PLCs, RUGGEDCOM Devices

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-25786
vulnerabilities.description: A critical Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the web servers of SIMATIC S7-1200 and S7-1500 PLCs. An authenticated attacker could inject malicious scripts by manipulating station or object names, potentially leading to session credential theft or tricking engineers into performing malicious actions.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-25787
vulnerabilities.description: A critical Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability in the web servers of SIMATIC S7-1200 and S7-1500 PLCs. An authenticated attacker could inject malicious scripts by manipulating station or object names, potentially leading to session credential theft or tricking engineers into performing malicious actions.

vulnerabilities.name: CVE-2026-25789
vulnerabilities.description: A high-severity Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability affecting the firmware update page of SIMATIC S7 PLCs. This flaw could be exploited via social engineering to compromise the integrity of the firmware update process.

vulnerabilities.name: RUGGEDCOM ROX Privilege Escalation Vulnerabilities
vulnerabilities.description: Multiple vulnerabilities in RUGGEDCOM ROX devices that could allow an attacker to execute commands with root privileges.

vulnerabilities.name: SENTRON 7KT PAC1261 Takeover Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.description: A vulnerability in SENTRON 7KT PAC1261 devices that could lead to a complete takeover of the device.

vulnerabilities.name: PAN-OS Vulnerability in RUGGEDCOM APE1808
vulnerabilities.description: The RUGGEDCOM APE1808 product is affected by an unspecified, recently disclosed PAN-OS vulnerability, highlighting supply chain risks.

indicators.name: Siemens SIMATIC Firmware Update Page Access
indicators.pattern:
title: Siemens SIMATIC Firmware Update Page Access
id: 7e8b1c2a-3d4e-4f5a-8b9c-0d1e2f3a4b5c
status: experimental
description: Detects access to the firmware update page of Siemens SIMATIC S7 PLCs, which has been associated with a Cross-Site Scripting (XSS) vulnerability (CVE-2026-25789).
references:
  - https://www.securityweek.com/ics-patch-tuesday-new-security-advisories-from-siemens-schneider-cisa/
author: cyber.netsecops.io
date: 2026-05-13
tags:
  - attack.t1190
  - attack.initial_access
level: medium
logsource:
  category: proxy
detection:
  selection:
    c-uri|contains:
      - '/FirmwareUpdate.html'
  condition: selection
indicators.description: Detects web requests to the Siemens SIMATIC firmware update page. This page was identified as having a Cross-Site Scripting vulnerability (CVE-2026-25789). While access can be legitimate for administrative purposes, it could also indicate an attempt to exploit the flaw.
